name: Ketchup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the top stem ends off of the tomatoes and peppers.
2. Rinse all vegetables thoroughly.
3. Cook the tomatoes, onions, celery, and peppers together until they are soft and mushy.
4. Force the mixture through a food press or very fine strainer to ensure a smooth consistency.
5. Place the strained mixture in a soup kettle.
6. Add the remaining ingredients (sugar, salt) to the kettle.
7. Boil for 10 minutes.
8. Pour the hot ketchup into sterilized jars and seal them properly.
Makes about 6 pints.
